creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Sergey Kozlov from comment #3)

NOTE we need to follow https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/kibana/4.3/kibana-plugins.html (because we are dealing with 4.3, not the latest release).  Fortunately, the same manual instructions exist.

However, under 'Switching Plugin Functionality', there is a reference to the 'Plugin chooser button'. I cannot locate this button in my Kibana (kibana43-4.3.3 from textproc/kibana43).

I am still investigating.
